description_long: This is a large, rectangular farm complex featuring multiple interconnected buildings with reddish-brown roofs and light-colored walls, surrounded by green fields and tree lines. The main structure is centrally located, with several wings extending outward, and is complemented by smaller outbuildings and utility structures. A paved driveway leads to a circular entrance area, and a spacious parking lot with marked spaces is visible near the front. The grounds are meticulously landscaped, with rows of trees, hedges, and open grassy areas, as well as fenced sections that may serve as pastures or gardens. The layout suggests a modern, organized agricultural facility, possibly a large estate or institutional farm. No heavy farm machinery or equipment is visible, and the overall appearance is clean and well-maintained.
description: A large, modern farm complex with multiple interconnected buildings, landscaped grounds, and a spacious parking lot, surrounded by fields and tree lines.
description_view_0: The main building complex is prominent, with a circular driveway and landscaped entrance visible, as well as a large open field and tree-lined perimeter.
description_view_1: The rear of the complex shows more greenery and dense tree coverage, with the main building's back wings and utility structures visible.
description_view_2: This side highlights the fenced green area and additional outbuildings, with the main structure and parking lot in the background.
description_view_3: The parking lot and entrance drive are most visible, along with the front-facing wings of the main building and adjacent smaller structures.
